description.overview: Shiba Inus are ancient Japanese dogs known for their fox-like appearance and cat-like independence. They're bold, confident, and popular worldwide.
description.temperament: Shibas are independent and cat-like. They're loyal but not clingy. Can be aloof with strangers and don't always get along with other dogs.
description.health: Generally healthy. Watch for allergies, hip dysplasia, and eye problems.
description.exercise: Moderate to high exercise needs. Need daily activity but aren't as demanding as some breeds.

best_for: Those wanting a clean, cat-like dog
verdict.summary: Independent, fox-like dogs with cat-like personalities. Shibas are clean and charming but stubborn. Best for experienced owners who appreciate their independent nature. Not cuddly lap dogs.
